attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
	SMXSS.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
	ST.DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
	ST.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
	ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
	ST.BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
	ST.SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
	ST.COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.QUANTITY AS ATTR_PRDT_QTY,                 
	ST.ATTR_PCT,
	ST.ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	ST.ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_CD,
	'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_CONTEXT_NAME,
	'3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS SRC_CREATED_DTM,
	'3500-01-01' AS DV_SRC_CREATED_DT,
	-999 AS SRC_CREATED_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	'3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS SRC_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
	'3500-01-01' AS DV_SRC_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
	-999 AS SRC_LST_UPD_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
	ST.AS_TS_CD,
	ST.SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
	ST.BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
	ST.BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
	ST.BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
	ST.TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
	ST.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
	-999 AS SK_RENEW_CONTRACT_LINE_ID,
	ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	ST.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
	ST.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
	ST.SS_CD,
	ST.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	ST.START_TV_DTM,
	CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM,
	ST.PID_MATCHING_VALUE AS ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME,
	ST.HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
	(CASE WHEN  ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ('Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') AND RENEWAL_REF_CD  ='LINE REFERENCE NUMBER' THEN 
  (CASE WHEN RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE<> 'UNKNOWN' THEN RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE ELSE RENEWAL_REF_ID END) 
  ELSE RENEWAL_REF_ID END) AS RENEWAL_REF_ID,
  (CASE WHEN  ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME NOT IN ('Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') AND RENEWAL_REF_CD  ='LINE REFERENCE NUMBER' AND RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE<> 'UNKNOWN'  THEN 'SO LINE ID'
  ELSE RENEWAL_REF_CD END) AS RENEWAL_REF_CD,
	ST.SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
	ST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
	ST.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
	ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
	ST.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
	ST.DV_TRX_TYPE AS  TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
    ST.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT AS SK_OPL_HEADER_ID_INT,
	ST.PRODUCT_KEY as BUNDLE_PRODUCT_KEY,
    ST.SK_CONTROL_ID_INT,
    ST.SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,  	
	COALESCE(ST.ATTRIBUTION_CD,'UNKNOWN') AS ATTRIBUTION_CD,     
    'N' AS ACTION_CODE, 
	'I' AS DML_TYPE,
     ST.RENEWAL_REF_RULE	
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING_ALL ST
  INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_BUNDLE SMXSS
	ON SMXSS.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID=ST.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID
	AND SMXSS.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = ST.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
	AND SMXSS.SS_CD = ST.SS_CD
	AND ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_BUNDLE_TV N_ATTR_TV 
 WHERE  COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN') NOT IN ( SELECT ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ORDER_ORIGIN )
 AND CASE WHEN N_ATTR_TV.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') 
  OR N_ATTR_TV.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'DISTI-DSV' THEN N_ATTR_TV.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID ELSE N_ATTR_TV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 END =   CASE WHEN ST.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') 
  OR ST.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'DISTI-DSV' THEN ST.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID ELSE ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
 END  AND CASE WHEN N_ATTR_TV.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') 
  OR N_ATTR_TV.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'DISTI-DSV' THEN N_ATTR_TV.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT ELSE N_ATTR_TV.SK_CONTROL_ID_INT  END =
   CASE WHEN ST.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME IN ( 'Billing', 'FLEXIBLE CONSUMPTION MODEL') 
  OR ST.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'DISTI-DSV' THEN ST.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT ELSE ST.SK_CONTROL_ID_INT  END
    AND N_ATTR_TV.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' 
	) 
	OR NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_BUNDLE_TV N_ATTR_TV 
 WHERE  COALESCE(ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,'UNKNOWN') IN ( SELECT ORDER_ORIGIN FROM $$ETLVWDB.EL_ORDER_ORIGIN )
 AND N_ATTR_TV.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID = ST.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID 
 AND N_ATTR_TV.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT =ST.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT
 AND N_ATTR_TV.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00' )
	)

SELECT
 SM.MAX_RTR_KEY + RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID, SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, SS_CD) AS ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY
 ,DT.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID
 ,DT.SS_CD
 ,DT.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM 
 ,USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM (
   SELECT SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID, SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,  SS_CD
     FROM $$STGDB.WI_RTR_BUNDLE_TAGGING_ALL ST
    WHERE NOT EXISTS
    ( SELECT SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID , SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, SS_CD
        FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_BUNDLE SM
    WHERE ST.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID = SM.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID
	AND ST.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = SM.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
	AND ST.SS_CD = SM.SS_CD
     )
   GROUP BY 1,2,3   
 ) DT,
(
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(WI.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY),0)  MAX_RTR_KEY 
FROM ( SEL ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL
		UNION ALL SEL ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV
		UNION ALL SEL ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_BUNDLE  
	) WI 
) SM

SELECT
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
	ST.DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
	ST.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
	ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.PRODUCT_KEY,
	ST.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
	ST.BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
	ST.SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
	ST.COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.QUANTITY,                      
	NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END ) AS ATTR_PCT, 
	COALESCE(NSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT ,0.0000)* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END )	AS ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	COALESCE(NSOA.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY,0)*COALESCE(NSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT,0.0000)* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END ) AS ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_CD,
	ST.ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
	ST.AS_TS_CD,
	ST.SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
	ST.BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
	ST.BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
	ST.BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
	ST.TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
	ST.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
	ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	ST.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
	ST.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
	ST.SK_CONTROL_ID_INT,
	ST.SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
	ST.SS_CD,
	NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	ST.START_TV_DTM,
	CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM,
	ST.PID_MATCHING_VALUE ,
	ST.HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_ID,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_CD,
	ST.SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
	ST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
	ST.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
	ST.ATTRIBUTION_CD,
	ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
	ST.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
	ST.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
	ST.DV_TRX_TYPE,
       ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
	ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
	ST.DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
	ST.PROCESS_FLAG,
    ST.CS_SCENARIO	,
	ST.RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
  FROM ( SELECT
			QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE/COALESCE(NULLIF(SUM_QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,0),100) AS RTR_PCT, 
			ST.*
		 FROM (
			SELECT 
          COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY,0) QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,
		  SUM(COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY,0)) OVER ( PARTITION BY ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY, ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ) SUM_QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,
		  COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY, ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ) REC_CNT
		  ,ST.*
		  FROM $$STGDB.WI_RTR_BUNDLE_TAG_CS_ERP ST
		  WHERE ST.AS_TS_CD='AS'
		    AND ST.CS_SCENARIO = 'ADDITIONAL_AS_ARCH_SKUS_IN_RTR'
		  ) ST
	) ST
    INNER JOIN ( SEL * FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION WHERE SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) NSOA 
ON NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
AND ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY = NSOA.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
AND NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='BIB'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION NSOA
					INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
						ON NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = NP.ITEM_KEY
					WHERE ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
					AND ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY = NSOA.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
					AND ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = NP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
					AND NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED' )
AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH WHERE NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = SFH.ITEM_KEY
		AND SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID = 'AS SUBSCRIPTION' )
AND ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID > 0

SELECT
	WI.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
	WI.DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
	SM.MAX_RTR_ATTRIB_ID + ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY WI.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) AS SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
	WI.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	WI.ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
	WI.PRODUCT_KEY,
	WI.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
	WI.BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
	WI.SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
	WI.COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
	WI.QUANTITY,                      
	WI.ATTR_PCT,
	WI.ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	WI.ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	WI.SALES_MOTION_CD,
	WI.ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
	WI.AS_TS_CD,
	WI.SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
	WI.BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
	WI.BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
	WI.BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
	WI.TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
	WI.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
	WI.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	WI.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
	WI.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
	WI.SK_CONTROL_ID_INT,
	WI.SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
	WI.SS_CD,
	WI.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	WI.START_TV_DTM,
	CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM,
	WI.PID_MATCHING_VALUE ,
	WI.HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
	WI.RENEWAL_REF_ID,
	WI.RENEWAL_REF_CD,
	WI.SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
	WI.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
	WI.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
	WI.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	WI.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
	WI.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
	WI.ATTRIBUTION_CD,
	WI.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
	WI.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
	WI.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
	WI.DV_TRX_TYPE,
	WI.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
	WI.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
	WI.DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
	WI.PROCESS_FLAG,
    WI.CS_SCENARIO,
	WI.RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
	WI.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
FROM ( SELECT
	ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
PRODUCT_KEY,
BK_QUOTE_NUM,
BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
QUANTITY,
ATTR_PCT,
ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
SALES_MOTION_CD,
ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
AS_TS_CD,
SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
SK_CONTROL_ID_INT,
SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
SS_CD,
SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
START_TV_DTM,
END_TV_DTM,
PID_MATCHING_VALUE,
HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
RENEWAL_REF_ID,
RENEWAL_REF_CD,
SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
ATTRIBUTION_CD,
BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
DV_TRX_TYPE,
QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
PROCESS_FLAG,
CS_SCENARIO,
RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
RENEWAL_REF_RULE
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_RTR_BUNDLE_TAG_NON_CS_ERP ST
 UNION
 SELECT
	ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
PRODUCT_KEY,
BK_QUOTE_NUM,
BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
QUANTITY,
ATTR_PCT,
ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
SALES_MOTION_CD,
ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
AS_TS_CD,
SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
SK_CONTROL_ID_INT,
SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
SS_CD,
SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
EDW_CREATE_DTM,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
START_TV_DTM,
END_TV_DTM,
PID_MATCHING_VALUE,
HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
RENEWAL_REF_ID,
RENEWAL_REF_CD,
SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
ATTRIBUTION_CD,
BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
DV_TRX_TYPE,
QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
PROCESS_FLAG,
CS_SCENARIO,
RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
RENEWAL_REF_RULE
  FROM $$STGDB.WI_RTR_BUNDLE_TAG_CS_ERP_OA ST     
 ) WI,
 ( SEL COALESCE(MAX(SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID),0) MAX_RTR_ATTRIB_ID  FROM      $$ETLVWDB.SM_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_BUNDLE )SM

SELECT
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
	ST.DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
	ST.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
	ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.PRODUCT_KEY,
	ST.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
	ST.BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
	ST.SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
	ST.COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.QUANTITY,                      
	CASE WHEN ST.CS_SCENARIO = 'NO_AS_ARCH_SKUS_IN_OA' THEN ATTR_PCT ELSE NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END ) END ATTR_PCT, 
	CASE WHEN ST.CS_SCENARIO = 'NO_AS_ARCH_SKUS_IN_OA' THEN ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT ELSE COALESCE(NSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT ,0.0000)* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END ) END AS ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	CASE WHEN ST.CS_SCENARIO = 'NO_AS_ARCH_SKUS_IN_OA' THEN ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT ELSE COALESCE(NSOA.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY*NSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT,0.0000)* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END ) END AS ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_CD,
	ST.ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
	ST.AS_TS_CD,
	ST.SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
	ST.BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
	ST.BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
	ST.BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
	ST.TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
	ST.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
	ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	ST.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
	ST.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
	ST.SK_CONTROL_ID_INT,
	ST.SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
	ST.SS_CD,
	NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	ST.START_TV_DTM,
	CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM,
	ST.PID_MATCHING_VALUE ,
	ST.HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_ID,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_CD,
	ST.SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
	ST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
	ST.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
	ST.ATTRIBUTION_CD,
	ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
	ST.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
	ST.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
	ST.DV_TRX_TYPE,
       ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
	ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
	ST.DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
	ST.PROCESS_FLAG,
    ST.CS_SCENARIO,
	ST.RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
	FROM ( SELECT
			QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE/COALESCE(NULLIF(SUM_QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,0),100) AS RTR_PCT, 
			ST.*
		 FROM (
			SELECT 
          COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY,0) QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,
		  SUM(COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY,0)) OVER ( PARTITION BY ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY ) SUM_QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,
		  COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY ) REC_CNT
		  ,ST.*
		  FROM $$STGDB.WI_RTR_BUNDLE_TAG_CS_ERP ST
		  WHERE ST.AS_TS_CD='AS'
		  ) ST
	) ST
    INNER JOIN ( SEL * FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION WHERE SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) NSOA 
ON NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
AND ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY = NSOA.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
AND ( ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = -999 )
AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH WHERE NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = SFH.ITEM_KEY
		AND SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID = 'AS SUBSCRIPTION' )  
AND NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED'

SELECT
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
	ST.DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
	ST.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
	ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.PRODUCT_KEY,
	ST.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
	ST.BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
	ST.SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
	ST.COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.QUANTITY,                      
	NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END ) AS ATTR_PCT, 
	COALESCE(NSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT ,0.0000)* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END )	AS ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	COALESCE(NSOA.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY,0)*COALESCE(NSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT,0.0000)* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END ) AS ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_CD,
	ST.ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
	ST.AS_TS_CD,
	ST.SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
	ST.BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
	ST.BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
	ST.BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
	ST.TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
	ST.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
	ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	ST.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
	ST.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
	ST.SK_CONTROL_ID_INT,
	ST.SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
	ST.SS_CD,
	NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	ST.START_TV_DTM,
	CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM,
	ST.PID_MATCHING_VALUE ,
	ST.HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_ID,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_CD,
	ST.SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
	ST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
	ST.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
	ST.ATTRIBUTION_CD,
	ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
	ST.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
	ST.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
	ST.DV_TRX_TYPE,
       ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
	ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
	ST.DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
      ST.PROCESS_FLAG,
      ST.CS_SCENARIO	,
	  ST.RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
	  ST.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
  FROM ( SELECT
			QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE/COALESCE(NULLIF(SUM_QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,0),100) AS RTR_PCT, 
			ST.*
		 FROM (
			SELECT 
          COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY,0) QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,
		  SUM(COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY,0)) OVER ( PARTITION BY ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY ) SUM_QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,
		  COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY ) REC_CNT
		  ,ST.*
		  FROM $$STGDB.WI_RTR_BUNDLE_TAG_CS_ERP ST
		  WHERE ST.AS_TS_CD='TS'
		  ) ST
	) ST
       INNER JOIN ( SEL * FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION WHERE SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) NSOA 
	ON NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
	AND ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY = NSOA.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
	INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH
	ON NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = SFH.ITEM_KEY
	WHERE NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED'
	AND SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID <> 'AS SUBSCRIPTION'

SELECT
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL_KEY,
	ST.DEAL_QUOTE_LINE_KEY,
	ST.SK_RTR_ATTRIBUTION_ID,
	ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
	ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.PRODUCT_KEY,
	ST.BK_QUOTE_NUM,
	ST.BK_SRC_EFFECTIVE_START_DT,
	ST.SRC_EFFECTIVE_END_DT,
	ST.COVERED_PRDT_KEY,
	ST.QUANTITY,                      
	NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END ) AS ATTR_PCT, 
	COALESCE(NSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT ,0.0000)* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END )	AS ATTR_NET_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	COALESCE(NSOA.PRODUCT_ATTRIBUTED_QTY*NSOA.UNIT_SELLING_PRC_TRX_AMT,0.0000)* ( CASE WHEN ST.REC_CNT > 1 THEN ST.RTR_PCT ELSE 1.00000 END ) AS ATTR_EXTD_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_CD,
	ST.ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_KEY,
	ST.AS_TS_CD,
	ST.SK_LINE_REF_NUM,
	ST.BK_AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
	ST.BK_TECH_GROUP_ID,
	ST.BK_DV_ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
	ST.TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
	ST.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID,
	ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	ST.ITEM_CATEGORY_NAME,
	ST.ERP_TRX_VERSION_INT,
	ST.SK_CONTROL_ID_INT,
	ST.SK_LINE_COUNT_INT,
	ST.SS_CD,
	NSOA.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT AS SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER  EDW_CREATE_USER,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
	USER EDW_UPDATE_USER, 
	ST.START_TV_DTM,
	CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS END_TV_DTM,
	ST.PID_MATCHING_VALUE ,
	ST.HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_ID,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_CD,
	ST.SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
	ST.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
	ST.MANUAL_OVERRIDE_ROLE,
	ST.REQUESTING_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CASE_NUM,
	ST.SLS_MTN_CORRECTION_CMNT,
	ST.ATTRIBUTION_CD,
	ST.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
	ST.ORDER_ORIGIN_CD,
	ST.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
	ST.DV_TRX_TYPE,
       ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,
	ST.DV_TRX_ERP_LINE_ID,
	ST.DV_TRX_VER_CONTROL_ID,
	ST.PROCESS_FLAG,
    ST.CS_SCENARIO,
	ST.RENEWAL_ERP_REF_VALUE,
	ST.RENEWAL_REF_RULE
  FROM ( SELECT
			QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE/COALESCE(NULLIF(SUM_QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,0),100) AS RTR_PCT, 
			ST.*
		 FROM (
			SELECT 
          COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY,0) QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,
		  SUM(COALESCE(ST.QUOTE_LINE_UNIT_NET_PRICE,0)*COALESCE(ST.QUANTITY,0)) OVER ( PARTITION BY ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY, ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ) SUM_QUOTE_LINE_EXT_NET_PRICE,
		  COUNT(*) OVER(PARTITION BY ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY, ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ) REC_CNT
		  ,ST.*
		  FROM $$STGDB.WI_RTR_BUNDLE_TAG_CS_ERP ST
		  WHERE ST.AS_TS_CD='AS'
		  ) ST
	) ST
    INNER JOIN ( SEL * FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_SOL_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION WHERE SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0 ) NSOA 
ON NSOA.TOP_SKU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=ST.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY    
AND ST.ATTR_PRDT_KEY = NSOA.ENTERPRISE_SKU_PRDT_KEY
AND NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED'
AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.MT_SVC_FINANCE_HIERARCHY SFH WHERE NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY = SFH.ITEM_KEY
		AND SFH.BK_ALLOCATED_SERVC_GROUP_ID = 'AS SUBSCRIPTION' )
AND ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID > 0
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NPP
  ON COALESCE(ST.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,-1012624) = NPP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
  AND NPP.ITEM_KEY=NSOA.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY
